issues.description: DSL is missing the [Opponent's Turn] effect that modifies base power to 6000 for all [Ohm] cards and this Character. The card text explicitly states this conditional power modification should occur during opponent's turn.
Target scope is too broad: 'AllOwnCharacters' includes all characters. Should be scoped to only [Ohm] type characters plus this Character (use condition or specify type filter).
Missing second effect for [Opponent's Turn] duration with PowerBoost action setting base power to 6000, with condition to target only [Ohm] cards and this Character.
